executiveSummary: The ADE - Trade semantic model has 45 tables (9 DirectQuery, 29 Dual, 7 Import) with 801 measures across a 6-billion-row daily trade snapshot fact table. The model spans 5 Databricks catalogs (sales, product, technology, supplychain, sourcingandbuying) with all serve-layer models materialised as views. Critical performance issues stem from: (1) a massive DirectQuery fact table (6.05B rows) as the central hub with 21 relationships, (2) 49 critical-complexity DAX measures generating up to 14 estimated SQL subqueries each, (3) 228 measures using ALL/ALLEXCEPT filter clearing patterns that force full re-aggregation, (4) 11 Dual-mode tables that could safely switch to Import, (5) 650 unused column candidates inflating scan width, and (6) 12 report pages averaging 22+ visuals each without query reduction settings enabled. The combination of wide column selection, cross-catalog JOINs, and no date filtering on serve views creates severe scan amplification on every user interaction.

topFindings.title: 6-Billion-Row Fact Table as DirectQuery Hub

impact.latency: Every visual touching Daily Trade generates SQL scanning billions of rows. With degree 21, nearly all report pages trigger queries against this table.
impact.cost: Each query reads the full fact table width (97 columns) via pass-through serve view.

evidence: Daily Trade: 6,052,560,794 rows, directQuery mode, degree 21 (hub table)
97 columns in fact table, 14 identified as removal candidates
94 measure references to Daily Trade
Serve view fact_product_option_trade_daily_snapshot_v1 has no WHERE filter

topFindings.title: DAX Pattern Families Amplify Query Cost (320+ Measures)

impact.latency: 204 Last Year and 116 Last Week comparison measures each use SUMX + FILTER(ALL) + time intelligence, generating 10-14 SQL subqueries per measure.
impact.cost: Pattern families share identical anti-pattern structures — fixing the template once fixes hundreds of measures.

evidence: 49 critical-complexity measures (score 44-45), each with 5-7 context transitions and 5-6 FILTER(ALL) calls
204 measures in 'Last Year Comparison' family (critical severity)
116 measures in 'Last Week Comparison' family (critical severity)
55 measures in 'Average Weekly Cover' family (critical severity)
77 total measures using FILTER(ALL) anti-pattern

topFindings.title: 29 Dual-Mode Tables — 11 Safe to Switch to Import

impact.latency: Dual tables are refreshed in Import mode AND queried via DirectQuery, doubling processing.
impact.cost: 11 Dual tables have no direct relationship to DirectQuery tables — safe to switch.

evidence: 29 tables in Dual mode out of 45 total
11 tables safe to switch: Daily/Weekly Financial HTD, MTD, YTD, Transform; Earliest Global dates; Time Period
Daily Financial Year to Date (2.96M rows) largest unnecessarily Dual table
BPA DUAL_MODE_TABLES: 25 violations

topFindings.title: Cross-Catalog DirectQuery JOINs Across 5 Catalogs

impact.latency: PBI generates SQL JOINing tables from sales, product, technology, supplychain, and sourcingandbuying in a single query.
impact.cost: Each catalog boundary adds serialisation overhead.

evidence: Source groups: dq:sales.serve (10), dq:technology.serve (15), dq:product.serve (9), dq:supplychain.serve (3), dq:sourcingandbuying.serve (1)
All serve models are pass-through views (SELECT * FROM curated_table)
topFindings.dependencyNote: Switching small cross-catalog dims to Import (RCA-03) reduces cross-catalog JOINs

topFindings.title: Report Pages Overloaded Without Query Reduction

impact.latency: 12 pages with 274 visuals. Topline Performance Date (31 visuals) fires 30+ simultaneous DQ requests on load. No query reduction settings enabled.
impact.cost: 19 wide matrices project 10-43 columns, amplifying bytes per visual.

evidence: 12/12 pages exceed 15-visual threshold
19 wide matrix visuals, worst: 43 projected columns
35 report-level filters (threshold: 10)
Cross-highlighting enabled, slicer/filter Apply buttons disabled
12 large embedded images

topFindings.title: 650 Unused Column Candidates Inflate Scan Width

impact.cost: 650 columns not referenced by any measure, relationship, or hierarchy. In DQ mode PBI may still request these in generated SQL.
impact.memory: For Dual/Import tables, unused columns consume VertiPaq memory.

evidence: 650 UNUSED_COLUMNS_CANDIDATE findings in BPA
UDA: 134 columns, 118 removal candidates
Option: 63 columns, 46 removal candidates
Daily Trade: 97 columns, 14 removal candidates

topFindings.title: 3 Bidirectional Relationships Create Ambiguous Filter Paths

impact.latency: Bidirectional cross-filtering on Option↔Option Ranking, Time Period↔Date, and Fabric Composition↔Option creates multiple filter propagation paths.

evidence: 3 bidirectional relationships detected
Option ↔ Option Ranking (many:many)
Time Period ↔ Date (many:one)
Product Option Fabric Composition ↔ Option (many:one)

topFindings.title: dbt Serve Views Missing Clustering and Date Filters

impact.latency: 6 curated tables lack liquid clustering. 2 serve views over large fact tables have no WHERE filter.

evidence: E02: 6 curated tables missing liquid clustering (2.5M-44.6M rows)
E04: 2 serve views without WHERE filters
E05: 6 models with functions on filter columns
E07: 6 models using ROW_NUMBER subquery instead of QUALIFY
E15: 2 serve views recommended for materialised_view

topFindings.title: 220 Snowflake DirectQuery Chains (Depth 4)

impact.latency: 220 snowflake DQ chains force nested subqueries in generated SQL, with depth up to 4 levels.

evidence: 220 SNOWFLAKE_DQ_CHAINS findings
Max snowflake depth: 4
Daily Trade → Option (bridge) → Product Option sub-tables
topFindings.dependencyNote: Flattening chains requires changes to both dbt serve layer and semantic model

topFindings.title: 115 Measures Exposed to MDX Without Need

impact.cost: 115 measures have isAvailableInMdx enabled — increases metadata overhead.

evidence: 115 IS_AVAILABLE_IN_MDX findings in BPA

topFindings.title: 3 Calculated Tables and 11 Unmarked Date Tables

impact.latency: Calculated tables computed at refresh. Unmarked date tables prevent auto time intelligence optimisation.
impact.quality: May cause incorrect time intelligence behaviour.

evidence: 3 CALCULATED_TABLES findings
11 DATE_TABLE_NOT_MARKED findings
3 TIME_INTEL_ON_DQ findings

actions.action: Enable query reduction settings in Trade report
actions.impact: 50-70% reduction in DQ query volume during interaction
Reduce fact scan from 6B to ~2.2B rows per query

actions.action: Switch 11 safe Dual tables to Import mode
actions.location: Daily Financial HTD/MTD/YTD, Weekly Financial refs, Time Period, Earliest Global dates
Option↔Option Ranking, Time Period↔Date, Fabric Composition↔Option
actions.impact: Removes ambiguous filter paths, simplifies query plans

actions.action: Add liquid clustering to 6 product curated tables
actions.impact: Enables data skipping on JOIN predicates for 2.5M-44.6M row tables

actions.action: Refactor Last Year/Last Week DAX measure templates using DATEADD
actions.impact: Reduce from 14 SQL subqueries to 2-3 per measure evaluation

actions.action: Remove 14 unreferenced columns from Daily Trade table
actions.impact: ~14% reduction in fact table scan width

actions.location: Topline Performance, Topline Performance Date pages
actions.impact: Halve simultaneous DQ queries per page load

actions.action: Convert small cross-catalog dimensions to Import
actions.impact: Eliminates cross-catalog JOINs for small lookup tables

actions.action: Add column projection to serve views
actions.impact: Reduce bytes scanned per query by limiting column exposure

actions.action: Create pre-aggregated materialised view for daily trade metrics
Refactor Average Weekly Cover measures to use pre-computed aggregates
actions.impact: Eliminates SUMX cost for weekly cover calculations

actions.action: Reduce matrix visual column counts across 19 wide matrices
Mark Date table as Date Table and disable auto date/time
Disable isAvailableInMdx for internal helper measures

skippedSteps.name: Databricks Metadata Profiling
skippedSteps.reason: Databricks MCP permission error on Technology SQL Warehouse. Volumetry from CSV used instead.

skippedSteps.name: Query Profiling
skippedSteps.reason: No Performance Analyzer export provided and Databricks query history unavailable due to permission error.
